name: Littleover and Blagreaves

locations.address:
Pear Tree Enquiry Office,
Pear Tree Section,
Pear Tree Road,
Derby,

description: This Safer Neighbourhood area covers Littleover. It belongs to the Derby West policing section. Geographically, Littleover Neighbourhood is made up of three areas: Blagreaves area; Littleover village; and the Heatherton estate (located off Rykneld Road), with the Blagreaves ward being largest of the three in both area and number of households.
